# FTCOMP Marker Segment Seed

This is the 64 KiB marker-expansion work segment observed at DOS `UNPACK2` marker-expander entry. Marker expansion starts in-place at offset `0xcfde`; back-references use 16-bit offset arithmetic inside this segment. Hex bytes are contiguous; whitespace is insignificant.
